name: @javargasm/pi-kiro
description_en: Kiro provider for the pi coding agent: AWS Builder ID / IAM Identity Center login and the CodeWhisperer streaming API, exposing the Kiro Claude model family.
description_zh: pi 编码代理的 Kiro 提供程序：AWS Builder ID / IAM Identity Center 登录和 CodeWhisperer 流式 API，暴露 Kiro Claude 模型系列。
